item.dc:creator: DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2

item.title: Just venting...feel free to ignore
item.description: This is probably gonna be an incoherent rant, but thats whats going on in my head so yeah. The meme is probably the most concise way Im able to say how I feel. Basically if I had a button in front of me that would magically turn me into a woman I would instantly press it. But I dont want to be transgender. I dont want to deal with changing my body manually, I dont want to deal with people hating me for it. I wish my brain was just okay with the packaging it came in, but it is not. Sometimes there are days where I think Im just imagining it all and Im completely fine with being male, but for the most part Im not. Another thing that frustrates me is that I cant even explain to myself why I want to be a woman. It just feels right I guess. But its something that has the potential to destroy my life so I would at least like to understand it myself. Im 22 now and have been struggling with this for a very long time. The first thought I remember which I now attribute to being trans, was when I was about 10. And while the urge has been constantly increasing, especially the past few years, I still feel like Im not any closer to any answers. The next problem is that while most of my friends would probably be okay with it if I came out, my coworkers would most certainly not. I have a job I really like, in a good company. I would honestly consider doing it for the rest of my life. But I hate most of my coworkers. Almost all of them are right wing, some I would consider far right. The amount of racist, sexist and also transphobe jokes I have heard is way too high for me to even consider coming out. Right now I manage by avoiding political discussions as much as possible, but yeah. So yeah. I have no idea what to do. If anyone read all of that, my condolences, and also thank you.
item.dc:creator: ObviousThrowawayAccountIsObvious

item.title: He's so dumb
item.description: Just so we are clear he quit after 10 months due to health concerns. you know like its unhealthy to be poor Also to be clear his goal wasn't just to be poor. it was that it's so easy to get rich that anyone can do it. so he would make 1 million dollars. He didn't miss it by 10k, by 100k, by 400k, by 600k, by 900K. He missed his target by 932,000. He made 68k in 10 months. so median household income. That's with his education and knowledge intact. It also greatly misrepresents homelessness, as he's degrading himself for millions of views/clicks homeless people deal with it every day without getting paid. He's a cunt of all cunts https://www.dailymail.co.uk/news/article-13332399/Millionaire-Mike-Black-homeless-broke-purpose-ends-bizarre-social-experiment.html
item.dc:creator: softspokensatan

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1183 (resting birch face)
item.description:
Morning returns. Coffee returns. Discovered a lovely musical banger for the dawn. Let's get this bread. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0ke0L5DOKQQ&ab_channel=CosmoSheldrake-Topic
It doesn't not maybe?
Yeah, I have trouble understanding my own mind sometimes.
SAUROPOD TORNADO PORTAL.
It's definitely my first thought when hit with failure or embarrassment. Ugh. Getting better, though.
Is stew soup? Is chili?
Snuggling Guilong.
This is important
Pippin tax! Today's (typed) message from Pippin: z, ih drydo h dis z I 6xzdxsðvr dd u u uh ð z 》♤♤€{□°○●}
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: When you get paid by the hour

item.title: Meet a barber who helps children who lost their hair in different accidents
item.description: https://www.instagram.com/franciscoprotesecapilar/ This young lady had hot oil spilled on her by her mother, it was an accident. Some of the other videos are of fire victims and deformations. What a beautiful transformation. I happy cried for her.

item.title: At the cow wash
item.description:
I had asked on a prior post what made this cow so fluffy, and some users said it was fluffy after a shampoo and blow dry.
I just remembered crossing paths with this old Timey cow wash on a hike last year, and wanted to share!
item.dc:creator: RainbowFlerken
